name: Crescent Pick
description: Mines ore from rocks to help unlock and upgrade your weapons.

name: Tablet of Peace
description: Collects Psyche from lingering Shades to increase your Arcana Card capacity.

name: Silver Spade
description: Digs up seeds that you can plant at The Crossroads to use in Incantations.

name: Rod of Fishing
description: Catches fish from water pools so you can trade them to the Broker.
